nextSteps.title: Next Steps After Your Operation
nextSteps.intro: Follow these guidelines carefully for a smooth and safe recovery. Our team is here to support you every step of the way.

steps.title: 1. Rest & Recovery
steps.description: Follow your doctor’s instructions on rest. Avoid strenuous activities for the first 48 hours. Keep the surgical area clean and dry.

steps.title: 2. Medication Schedule
steps.description: Take prescribed pain relievers and antibiotics exactly as directed. Do not skip doses. Contact the pharmacy if you experience any side effects.

steps.title: 3. Wound Care
steps.description: Change dressings as demonstrated by the nurse. Watch for signs of infection: redness, swelling, or unusual discharge. Call us immediately if you notice any.

steps.title: 4. Follow‑Up Appointment
steps.description: You will receive a call from our scheduling team within 3 days. Please confirm your next visit. Bring all discharge documents to the appointment.

steps.title: 5. Activity & Diet
steps.description: Gradually resume light walking. Drink plenty of water and eat soft, nutritious meals. Avoid alcohol and smoking during recovery.

steps.title: 6. Emergency Contact
steps.description: If you experience severe pain, fever above 38°C, or bleeding, call our 24/7 emergency line: +94 21 222 6600.
